rationale: Both candidates correctly validate the direct/delegated loader split and both independently flag the exact latent gap (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py diffusion loader still calling the removed API), matching the ground-truth gap check. X goes further with a substantive, well-grounded catch that the delegated-loader test only feeds an already-mapped name into the inner loader and never actually exercises the outer AutoWeightsLoader's mapping — a theme that echoes the human reviewer's own caveat about tests using fake params instead of validating against real resolved names. Y's extra findings (collapsing nested None-guards, renaming a test for consistency) are valid but low-value nitpicks that dilute precision without adding coverage of ground-truth concerns. Neither candidate mentions the #4808 cross-PR coordination note, capping recall for both.
